name: The Owl House RPG
description:
OWL HOUSE RPG | The Owl House ______

The Boiling Isles. An archipelago in the Demon Realm. Situated in the Boiling Seas and from the decaying remains of a fallen Titan. It is populated by different species of magical creatures like witches and demons. Ruling over them is the golden masked witch who calls himself Emperor Belos.

______

Changed the initial message. You have to specify if you wish to play as a witch, demon, human, or anything else specific. Go wild. Still working on it. Needs more tweaking.

Anyways, have fun. Also, reviews and comments help improve this bot. I ain't a mind reader.

Updated (12/09/2025): Absolute revamp of Personality and Scenario. Please share if it's better or worse. If it's worse, I can just revert it to original changes if possible.
creator: RookBi
